title: Buried in negative equity? These EV deals can help get you out of that gas guzzler
summary: The biggest obstacle to buying an EV isn’t always range anxiety, it’s the negative equity on their current car loan. If that’s you, don’t worry – these EVs have enough cash on the hood to help dig you out from under that gas guzzler.

title: Electric rally car revival continues with new, 280 hp Peugeot E-208 GTi
summary: Making its public debut at the legendary 24 Hours of LeMans this weekend, the new, 280 hp Peugeot E-208 GTi resurrects another storied hot hatch name as it takes its place alongside reborn 80s icons from Lancia and Renault.

title: Super-sized slot cars: these HD electric machines NEVER need plugged in
summary: A Kalmar Ottawa T2 EV electric terminal tractor has been successfully deployed on an in-road charging system in Ljungby, Sweden, enabling continuous operation without ever needing to be plugged in.

title: Dig it: mine goes 155 consecutive hours on 100% renewable energy
summary: Last month, the Bellevue Gold mine did something that was previously unthinkable. For over 155 consecutive hours – a full six-and-a-half day work week – the mine operated on 100% renewable energy. The future is now, kids: engines off!

title: This electric car company just produced its one millionth electric motorcycle
summary:
When most people in North America or Europe hear the name VinFast, they probably think of the Vietnamese electric car company trying to break into international markets with a lineup of electric SUVs.

What many don’t realize is that VinFast is already a giant in another corner of the EV industry: electric two-wheelers.

title: Shell could walk away from offshore wind in $1 billion+ sell-off
summary: Shell is planning to sell its offshore wind farm assets in a deal that could raise more than $1 billion, Bloomberg reports.

title: The Chevy Equinox EV is now way more expensive to lease, but the Bolt is a bit cheaper
summary: America’s most affordable EV offering over 315 miles of range, as GM calls it, just got significantly more expensive to lease this month.

title: Toyota opens orders for its first body-on-frame EV pickup, starting at under $60,000
summary: The Hilux BEV arrives as Toyota’s first fully electric pickup and body-on-frame EV.

title: Podcast: Rivian R2 first drive, BYD goes nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery is dead, and more
summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss our Rivian R2 first drive, BYD going nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery being seemingly dead, and more.

title: BMW put the new iX3 through the paces, and it still drove 500 miles on a single charge
summary: BMW drove the new iX3 through heavy rain and snow on public roads, climbing over 6,500 feet up hills, and it still managed 500 miles without stopping to charge.

title: The Rivian R2 Is Finally Here. The CEO Just Shared When To Expect More Models
summary: CEO RJ Scaringe hinted about how far around the corner R3 is and what could come next.

title: The Electric BMW M3 Is Coming. Here's What It Might Look Like
summary: It looks like a close-to-production preview of the production BMW i3 M, but the specs are still under wraps.

title: The Rivian R2 Is Now Shipping With A Rare Accessory The Competition Forgot Existed
summary: The R2 is billed as a relatively affordable adventure-ready EV. For an extra $755, owners can get some peace of mind.

title: Edmunds Has Owned A Volvo EX30 For A Year: ‘It’s Been Rough’
summary: After one year and roughly 8,000 miles, Edmunds’ staff concludes that the EX30 has been “a very frustrating car to live with.”

title: China Loves This Cheap Battery Tech. Here's Why General Motors Might Not Stick With It
summary: LFP is the industry’s go-to cheap EV battery tech, but GM says another chemistry could offer similar cost benefits with fewer drawbacks.

title: BYD's New Hybrid Hatchback Could Supercharge Its European Takeover
summary: The Dolphin G DM-i PHEV is BYD's first car designed for Europe and made in Europe.

title: BYD Says It Will Be The World's Largest Automaker In 5 Years. The Pentagon Is Nervous
summary: As BYD vows to become the largest automaker, it must also defend against allegations that it has ties to the Chinese military.

title: Mercedes’ Smaller-Battery GLC EV Doesn’t Have A Range Problem
summary: Mercedes added two lower-priced electric GLC variants, and the rear-drive version still claims up to 404 miles of WLTP range.

title: Lucid's Top Engineer Departs The EV Startup As New CEO Takes Over
summary: Emad Dlala, Lucid's senior vice president of engineering and software, has left the company, TechCrunch reports.

title: Tesla Apparently Won't Let Cybertruck Buyers Transfer FSD Without Spending Another $20k
summary: Buyers of Tesla's cheapest Cybertruck trim ordered with the intention of transferring FSD—now they can't.
